message:
📖 Add adoption metrics documentation for CNCF incubation (#10823)

Add docs/ADOPTION-METRICS.md with a structured framework for tracking
adoption metrics across six categories: web analytics (GA4), installation
metrics, active usage, community engagement, marketplace activity, and
ecosystem integration. Includes methodology section covering data collection,
privacy considerations, and update cadence.

This supports CNCF incubation due diligence by providing a template that
can be populated with real data as it becomes available.

Signed-off-by: Copilot <copilot@github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <copilot@github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
